name: Hawaiian Flours Bread Recipe
recipeIngredient: 6 tbsp Nine grain mix (optional but recommended)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the white cake mix and whole wheat bread flour.
3. Add the white bread flour, regular unbleached flour, yeast, margarine, gluten flour, dough conditioner, sugar, water or milk, and nine grain mix (if using) to the bowl with the white cake mix ingredients.
4. Mix all the ingredients together until a soft dough forms.
5. Turn off the heat and knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes until it is smooth and elastic.
6. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for about an hour or until doubled in size.
7. Punch down the dough and shape it into a loaf.
8. Place the loaf on a greased baking sheet and let it rise again for 20-30 minutes.
9. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
10. Bake the bread for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
11. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
